feedback.text: Hello, I would love to see more proection from publishers destroying video games - I don't think it's fair to not have access to a game I purchased from in a near future and publishers need to find solutions. For example offering a public build after the game is over, a lot of fans are actually interested in keeping a game alive and hundreds of games are being destroyed right now and more will come soon. I also think personally video games should also be classified as a medium for art in general like movies, paintings, photos. I also supported a "stop killing games initative" which is being supported by over 1.000.000 people.
